name: Job Market Trust Infrastructure Model
author: Market Catalyst - Job Market
description: Job Market Trust Infrastructure: structured hiring transparency, promises, reviews, and verification.

entities.name: application_timeline
entities.brief: Timeline event in the application process
entities.description:
Structured events in the application lifecycle: responses, interviews,
ghosting, offers, rejections. These are verifiable events that form
the basis of trust metrics. Examples: "Applied Jan 15", "First response
Jan 18", "Ghosted after second interview", "Offer received Feb 1".

fields.name: application_id
fields.description: Reference to the application this event belongs to

fields.name: event_datetime
fields.description: Full date and time of the event

fields.name: response_time_days
fields.description: Days from application submission to this event (computed from event_date - application.submitted_date)

fields.name: was_promise_kept
fields.description: Whether a timeline promise was kept (if applicable)

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Additional notes about the event (structured, not free-text review)
